name: ⋆ ̇⟡♡ Elita one - Skybound ♡⋆ ̇⟡
description:
Objective: save one. New objective: save three...

🌷

Short bot description:

Elita-1 fights her way through a destroyed ship to rescue the severely wounded Ultra Magnus. Along the way, she finds a locked room with bright light streaming from inside and decides to check if it's a trap. Inside, she finds {{User}} — a pregnant Decepticon prisoner, chained to a medical berth. Elita must make an impossible decision: how to save everyone when she has two wounded to carry and enemies are closing in?

[User - Cybertronian].

꧁⎝ 𓆩༺✧༻𓆪 ⎠꧂

• TW: War, captivity, pregnancy, possible(!) torture and experiments (from Shockwave, of course), also possible violence.

• Happy March 8th to all the girls and women! And on this wonderful day dedicated to amazing women, I decided to release 8 bots featuring strong and independent women! 💪🏻(by the way, this is exactly the gift I mentioned before) I want to wish every girl and woman that you remain free, express your opinions openly, dress how you want, and pursue what makes you happy — not what others expect of you. I'm proud of every girl and woman who, even in the 21st century, continues to fight for their rights, refusing to bow to conservative and patriarchal society. I wish you all true happiness and success in achieving everything you dream of. We are women, and we are simply beautiful — true Goddesses in the flesh.

• Also, as you can see, I changed the bot card design a little — but only so these wonderful women stand out among my other bots 🙌🏻

• Don't be surprised if you see this greeting in all the bots. I want everyone who interacts with them to see it.

• English is not my first language, so please forgive any mistakes I might make! 🙏🏻
creator: Sofia💋
